title: Xtra Arrows
description: An Archery Expansion Mod which adds lots of Extra Arrows. (Neo)Forge & Fabric
body: ## The Arrows **There are currently 95 new arrows. These arrows come in 27 new types and 5 tiers.** ![Arrow Types Cutout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NROnqTK4/images/18b3bd9ce54dce5ece914c382ca0bc21f2ddffc4.png) ## Server Hosting Discount **Follow the link below and use code "JACKBUSTERS" at checkout for 25% off server hosting.** [![Rent a server discount](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ba99da02-fd57-4ccc-89a5-9a5bba0922d2.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/jackbusters?r=Xtra-Arrows-Modrinth) ## Media
